entities.name: Moonshot
entities.context: High-risk endeavor that forces operation at higher complexity levels, valuable for internal growth even if it fails financially

entities.name: Slam dunk
entities.context: Low-risk endeavor with high win probability but limited complexity exposure

entities.name: Ratchet effect
entities.context: Permanent elevation of personal capacity baseline after solving problems at moonshot scale

entities.name: Complexity exposure
entities.context: Optimization strategy prioritizing exposure to hard problems over win probability

entities.name: Capability compounding
entities.context: Long-term non-linear accumulation of skills and perspectives through challenging endeavors

entities.name: Internal growth
entities.context: Permanent expansion of individual capability and worldview during an attempt

entities.name: External win
entities.context: Financial or measurable success outcome of an endeavor

relationships.context: Pursuing moonshots generates internal growth more valuable than external wins from easier tasks
Moonshot projects create the ratchet effect on personal capacity
Optimizing for complexity exposure enables long-term capability compounding
Slam dunks optimize for win probability and external success
The ratchet effect is the mechanism by which capability compounds permanently
V believes internal growth can be more valuable than external wins
